name: Evigishki Merrowgeist
name_jp: イビリチュア・メロウガイスト
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
After damage calculation, if this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; shuffle the destroyed monster into the Deck instead of sending it to the Graveyard.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
After damage calculation, if this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; shuffle the destroyed monster into the Deck instead of sending it to the Graveyard.
eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
After damage calculation, if this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; shuffle the destroyed monster into the Deck instead of sending it to the Graveyard.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 1 - Chapter of Awakening

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Returns to the Deck cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
